milestones.title: Money utilities
milestones.spec: toCents(dollars), formatCents(cents) -> "$X.XX", addCents(...amounts). Reject non-numbers and non-integer cents. ESM; test() blocks only.

milestones.title: Account ledger
milestones.spec: createLedger() -> { post({account, amount}), balanceOf(account) }. Amounts in integer cents. balanceOf sums postings; 0 if none. post throws on invalid entry.

milestones.title: Category report
milestones.spec: totalsByCategory([{category, amount}]) -> { category: sumCents }. Throw on empty category.
